sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Lungsim gal dona le dahna sung panin,
Kei sang a sangzaw suangpi ka delh nuam hi,
Mawhlua, gimlua zo Nang a hong hi ta ning,
A kip Suangpi aw, Nangmah kong bel ta hi.

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Sunin gamdai a, dahin lungleeng laitak,
Ze-etna in a vang tawh hong tuam ciangin,
Nuntak huihpi nung, tuipi kihual laitak,
Thupha Suangpi aw, hong liahin bit takin.

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Gal do laitakin gal in hong neh ciangin,
Tai-in kong ko zel hi, ka belh Suangpi aw,
Tuihual bang ze-et gimna hong tun ciangin,
Na sung kong bu hi, keima kha Suangpi aw.
